Calculator.disclaimerText: This calculator processes the standard order of penetration and reduction. However, slight discrepancies from actual in-game values may occur due to complex overlapping mechanics.

Metadata.description: The comprehensive information site for League of Legends: Wild Rift (WildRiftHub), featuring the latest tier lists, patch notes, and champion matchups.

Guide.title: Beginner's Guide
Guide.subtitle: A complete starter guide for players new to Wild Rift. Learn the basic rules, lane roles, and essential techniques.
Guide.introDesc: Wild Rift is a 5v5 MOBA (Multiplayer Online Battle Arena) game. Each player controls a powerful character called a 'Champion.' Your goal is to work with your team to destroy enemy defense turrets and ultimately destroy the enemy base's core, the 'Nexus,' to win the game.
Guide.mapDesc: The map consists of three main paths (Lanes) and the forest area between them (Jungle). Typically, the 5 players on a team split into the following roles:
Guide.laneSoloDesc: Defends the Solo lane alone. Mostly occupied by durable Tanks or duel-oriented Fighters.
Guide.laneJungleDesc: Instead of staying in a lane, the Jungler defeats monsters in the forest and surprises lanes with unexpected ambushes (Ganks).
Guide.laneMidDesc: Controls the central, shortest lane alone. High-damage Mages and swift Assassins typically play here.
Guide.laneDuoDesc: A ranged physical attacker. Weak early in the game but grows to deal massive damage in the late game.
Guide.laneSupportDesc: Pairs with the Duo (ADC) in lane. Focuses on setting up vision (Wards), healing/protecting, and disabling enemies.
Guide.flowTitle: 3. The Flow of the Game (3 Phases)
Guide.flowLaningDesc: Stay in your designated lane to defeat minions for experience and gold. Focus on leveling up and buying items while avoiding unnecessary fights.
Guide.flowMidDesc: Group up with teammates to destroy turrets and defeat epic monsters like Dragons and Rift Heralds to secure team-wide buffs.
Guide.flowLateDesc: Both teams gather for massive 5v5 clashes. Securing 'Baron Nashor' grants a powerful siege buff to push into the enemy base for the win.
Guide.techLastHitDesc: You only get full gold when you deal the finishing blow (Last Hit) to a minion. Watch their HP bar and strike at the very last moment.
Guide.techVisionDesc: Enemies can surprise you from the fog of war. Place 'Wards' in bushes to illuminate dark paths and stay safe from enemy ganks.
Guide.techMapDesc: Get into the habit of glancing at the mini-map every few seconds to keep track of missing enemies and help your teammates in fights.
Guide.recomDesc: These champions have simple kits and are excellent for learning the fundamental mechanics of the game.
Guide.settingsDesc: Optimal settings for iPhone and Android to reduce lag and enjoy a smooth gaming experience.
Guide.iosFps: • Frame Rate: '60 FPS' is highly recommended. 120 FPS is smooth but leads to rapid device heating, which can cause screen dimming and severe stuttering (thermal throttling).
Guide.iosGraphics: • Graphics Quality: 'Medium' or 'High'. Slightly reducing effect quality significantly lowers battery drain and heat generation.
Guide.iosFocus: • Prevent Touch Misfires: Enable iOS 'Focus Mode (Gaming)' to block pop-up notifications from interfering during intense combat.
Guide.androidFps: • Frame Rate Setting: '60 FPS' is the sweet spot. Unless you use a premium flagship device, 60 FPS is the most stable setting.
Guide.androidBoost: • System Optimization: Turn on your device's built-in gaming assistant (e.g. Galaxy's Game Booster) to restrict background tasks and release RAM.
Guide.androidGraphics: • Lag Stutter Fix: If you experience frame drops, set resolution and post-processing effects to 'Low' or 'Medium' to prioritize gameplay smoothness.
Guide.inGameDesc: Recommended setting adjustments to boost your controls and spatial awareness in the match.
Guide.inGameCameraDesc: Allows you to shift the camera focus by dragging the eye icon. Highly recommended to secure wider vision towards lanes and enemies for aiming skillshots.
Guide.inGameTargetDesc: Configures basic attacks to automatically target enemies with the lowest numerical health, making it much easier to secure final blows.
Guide.inGameChatDesc: Prevents in-game chat toxicity from random teammates. Strongly recommended to maintain peace of mind and focus on your own performance.
Guide.inGameDashDesc: Forces dash abilities to fire towards your left-stick movement direction rather than locking onto nearby enemies. Crucial for clean escapes.
